name: Tushar Jain
tagline: Results-driven Software Developer specializing in scalable backend systems, full-stack development, and AI/ML, committed to delivering robust and innovative software solutions.
about: Tushar Jain is a dedicated Software Developer with a Bachelor of Technology in Electronics and Communication Engineering. He excels in architecting and deploying scalable backend services, optimizing API performance, and enhancing system efficiency across diverse platforms. His extensive full-stack experience encompasses Python, Node.js, React, and various database technologies. Tushar has a proven track record of successfully contributing to complex projects, including developing ERP and healthcare platforms, strengthening security protocols, and implementing AI/ML-based recommender systems. His commitment to technical excellence and continuous learning is evidenced by his recognition as a Semi-Finalist in Flipkart Grid 5.0 and selection for the Amazon ML Summer School 2024.
highlights: Architected and developed scalable backend services using NestJS, implementing modular architecture and well-defined REST APIs.
Built Python-based microservices for PDF processing and asynchronous workflows, enabling decoupled and scalable system design.
Designed backend systems for a healthcare platform (Trijog), including booking, invoicing, and communication pipelines.
Established CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, improving deployment reliability and system stability.
Optimized API performance and improved frontend-backend integration for better system efficiency.
Strengthened security protocols and rules of a chat messaging system, resulting in zero data breaches.
Collaborated on an AI/ML-based Flipkart recommender system, achieving Semi-Finalist status in Flipkart Grid 5.0.
Selected for Amazon ML Summer School 2024.

projects.name: Contest-Saathi
projects.description: Designed and developed Contest-Saathi, a web application that delivers personalized email notifications for competitive programming contests. This platform ensures real-time updates for users, attracting over 50 active subscribers who rely on it for timely contest information.

projects.name: Insight Terminal
projects.description: Developed 'Insight Terminal,' a Cobra-based CLI tool that significantly streamlines user interaction with Gemini AI. It enhances command-line efficiency and leverages advanced natural language processing to deliver accurate, real-time responses and intelligent information retrieval.
